title: Robin Hood
desc: A modern Robin Hood switches from stealing to protecting when circumstances make him the reluctant bodyguard of a high-profile client.

title: Middle Class Melodies
desc: Raghava, a young man, runs an eatery in his village but wishes to open a small hotel in a nearby town. However, he faces challenges in his quest.

title: Nela Ticket
desc: Nela Ticket, an orphan, is raised by Ananda Bhoopati, who is later killed by his own son, Aditya. However, things turn ugly after Nela Ticket and Aditya come face-to-face.
